nasb.text: I have heard a message from the Lord, And an envoy is sent among the nations, saying, “Gather yourselves together and come against her, And rise up for battle!”

esv.text: I have heard a message from the Lord, and an envoy has been sent among the nations: “Gather yourselves together and come against her, and rise up for battle!

cnv.text: 我從耶和華那裡聽見了一個信息， 有一位使者被派往列國去，說： “你們要聚集去攻擊以東， 要起來爭戰！”

ccb.text: 我从耶和华那里听到消息， 有位使者被派去联合列国来攻打以东。
